allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Phase 0: project scaffolding

- cargo init --name dcx
- Add dependencies: clap \(derive\), clap_complete, sha2
- Add dev-dependencies: assert_cmd, predicates, assert_fs
- make check passes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Phase 1: pure logic / sans-IO functions

Implement all pure modules with TDD \(53 unit tests, all passing\):
- naming: sanitize_name, compute_hash, mount_name, relay_dir, is_dcx_managed_path
- mount_table: parse_proc_mounts, parse_mount_output, find_mount_source
- categorize: MountStatus enum + categorize function
- exit_codes: SUCCESS/RUNTIME_ERROR/USAGE_ERROR/USER_ABORTED/PREREQ_NOT_FOUND
- format: format_status_table, format_doctor_report, format_clean_summary

make check passes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git -C /home/epsilon/myrepos/dc add src/categorize.rs src/format.rs src/mount_table.rs src/naming.rs)

Bash(git -C /home/epsilon/myrepos/dc commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix Phase 1 spec review issues \(rounds 3 & 4\)

- format_doctor_report: guard all_passed with !checks.is_empty\(\) to fix
  vacuous truth bug \(empty input was incorrectly emitting "All checks passed."\)
- format_doctor_report: strengthen empty-input test to assert absence of
  "All checks passed."
- categorize: add module-level doc table explaining Stale/Empty split vs
  spec prose; add note to categorize\(\) doc about impossible inputs
- categorize: add tests for logically-impossible \(false,*,true\) inputs
- sanitize_name: add test for digit preservation
- hash_is_8_lowercase_hex_chars: assert lowercase specifically, not just
  is_ascii_hexdigit\(\) which also accepts uppercase A-F
- parse_proc_mounts: add test for truncated/malformed octal escape
- format_status_table: add column-alignment test verifying MOUNT column
  starts at same position in header and data rows
EOF
\)")
